title: Soundtrack QuestionDriving Me Crazy
wikitext:
[]: Soundtrack Question..Driving Me Crazy             Quote Post by bogey » Thu Aug 16, 2012 10:09 am in episode 17, an ominous ambient song plays when Rei is in the test tube and gendo and ritsuko watch over her LINK REMOVED it starts at 6:54 when Rei appears in the test tube and ends at 7:30. what song is that? i've listened to all the songs on the soundtracks and it doesn't seem to be on there

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 16, 2012 1:07 pm In accordance with our rules, please do not link to sites illegally hosting copyright materials: http://wiki.evageeks.org/EvaGeeks_Forum_Rules_and_Guidelines#Other

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 16, 2012 1:09 pm To answer your question, it isn't music. It's just a soundscape, and it's not on any soundtrack that I'm familiar with.
